name: ACP Holdings Acquisition Corp.
business: ACP Holdings Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated on January 28, 2026 as a Cayman Islands exempted company, formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has no material operations and has not selected any business combination target. The company intends to focus on companies with an aggregate enterprise value of approximately $750 million or greater, that complement the management team's background of identifying and executing on private credit investments.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until the date that is 18 months from the closing of this offering or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to consummate our initial business combination.
